| | | Friend,

As one of Martin's top supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that Martin will be going on a hike Sunday morning, and you're invited to join him! I've included the event details below, and our team really hopes you can join us on Sunday for the hike!

**Where:** Sandia Mountains, Tres Pistolas Trailhead, Albuquerque NM

name: TimKaine.com
subject: Kavanaugh hearing today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek,

This week, the Republican majority is trying to ram through Judge Brett Kavanaugh's confirmation hearing to the Supreme Court, despite thousands upon thousands of documents being denied to Senators and the public that would help us all understand more about his record and beliefs.

Democrats on the Judiciary Committee spoke up this morning to say it is flat-out _wrong_ to do that - and they are right.

**This is a lifetime appointment to the most powerful court in America. Let that sink in.**

**The American people deserve to have information on who this judge is. We deserve to know his beliefs and his record. And this hearing should be put on ice until we get that information.**

[Sign your name if you agree that a rushed Supreme Court confirmation is partisanship at its worst, and we should not let this get to a vote without knowing exactly what we're voting on.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f110f/3e0906/6d5fd02b/3e36c80b/873784432/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Kavanaugh?source=20180904_4_PET_TEAM_Kavanaugh&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Sign+your+name+if+you+agree+that+a+rushe&utm_campaign=20180904_4_PET_TEAM_Kavanaugh")

Thanks,

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: WSJ: Why Republicans Stick With Trump
body:
**Why Republicans Stick with Trump**
_It’s all the things he hasn’t done. On key issues, the president has come around to conservative positions_

The Wall Street Journal | Bobby Jindal

|
---

With each new controversy, Donald Trump’s opponents plead with Republicans to denounce him. Hasn’t Mr. Trump broken from GOP orthodoxy on free trade, immigration and entitlement reform? Not to mention the personal scandals and the never-ending tweets. Why do Republican leaders hesitate to rebuke him?

A shallow answer is politics: Sens. Jeff Flake and Bob Corker both tangled with Mr. Trump, and it turned out to be political suicide. But to get a deeper answer, it’s instructive to examine what Mr. Trump hasn’t done. Since the campaign, Mr. Trump has abandoned many of his previous positions and embraced traditional conservative views.

[Read more...](http://wc4.net/t?r=4673&c=8620&l=203&ctl=20BA5:C15079EF2606CA7CB6D6FF69902240A3696548644412C47B&)

* * *

[Unsubscribe](http://wc4.net/u?id=C15079EF2606CA7CB6D6FF69902240A3696548644412C47B)

Peter,

Supreme Court confirmation hearings began yesterday, and they are a painful reminder of where we are as a nation. Kavanaugh is anti-worker, anti-women, anti-voting rights. And his appointment brings up the memory of how Mitch McConnell blocked the nomination of Merrick Garland.

**[Donate $20 today to elect Mike Siegel to the House, and bring real checks and balances back to our government.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2098195/10887733/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2VkYjE2NC0wNGIxLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMzY2YzEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vol6sIbwZvENFvnqiSaRSvoX3oAPpvPzQ7d3GWZ-CEI=)**

The hearings also remind us how important it is to change Texas’s representation in the Senate. If we can replace Ted Cruz and John Cornyn, we aren’t likely to face another justice who puts corporate rights over human rights.

Here in Texas, we are all pushing hard to elect Beto O’Rourke. And part of that effort is a full ticket, from top to bottom. For the first time in recent history, Democrats are running in all 36 Congressional Districts. And in “red” Districts for Texas Senate and Texas House, and for local offices, we also have many strong candidates.

**[Flipping the House is our chance to hold the Republican Regime accountable. Donate today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2098196/10887734/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2VkYjE2NC0wNGIxLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMzY2YzEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vol6sIbwZvENFvnqiSaRSvoX3oAPpvPzQ7d3GWZ-CEI=)**

My campaign has been working “up the ballot” with Beto but also “down the ballot” with candidates like Gina Callani in Texas House District 132. Every week in Katy and Cypress, we knock doors with Gina, a labor-backed candidate who is running a strong campaign in a longtime Republican district that overlaps with Congressional District 10.

And just last week, we co-hosted a town hall in Sealy, Texas, with Justice of the Peace candidate Hilda Gomez and the Austin County Democratic Party. The local party chair, Pat Burns, said how happy he is that my campaign is working hard in his predominantly Republican area. And that’s the idea, behind my campaign and Beto’s campaign and others: letting folks across Texas know that we care, and that we are fighting for them.

**[We have two months left to lay the foundation for lasting change in Texas and the nation. Donate today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2098197/10887735/1664269967?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2VkYjE2NC0wNGIxLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMzY2YzEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vol6sIbwZvENFvnqiSaRSvoX3oAPpvPzQ7d3GWZ-CEI=)**

When we contest every county and every district across Texas, we are building for a stronger future. I am running for Congress to win this seat and to represent the people of this District. But a second objective, just as important if not more so, is to do the necessary work of organizing in every community, to make sure we are ready to fight for a more democratic nation, in 2018 and beyond.

We are confident we will take back the House — and perhaps the Senate too. But know that we are doing the necessary work here in Texas, and every dollar you give will help pave the way for a brighter future for all of us.

We have two months to go. **[Please join us, dig deep, and propel us to victory!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2098198/10887736/1664269967?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2VkYjE2NC0wNGIxLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMzY2YzEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vol6sIbwZvENFvnqiSaRSvoX3oAPpvPzQ7d3GWZ-CEI=)**

Fighting for you,
Mike

clean_body: = Join our team! = or =. Peter, Supreme Court confirmation hearings began yesterday, and they are a painful reminder of where we are as a nation. Kavanaugh is anti-worker, anti-women, anti-voting rights. And his appointment brings up the memory of how Mitch McConnell blocked the nomination of Merrick Garland. = The hearings also remind us how important it is to change Texas’s representation in the Senate. If we can replace Ted Cruz and John Cornyn, we aren’t likely to face another justice who puts corporate rights over human rights. Here in Texas, we are all pushing hard to elect Beto O’Rourke. And part of that effort is a full ticket, from top to bottom. For the first time in recent history, Democrats are running in all 36 Congressional Districts. And in “red” Districts for Texas Senate and Texas House, and for local offices, we also have many strong candidates. = My campaign has been working “up the ballot” with Beto but also “down the ballot” with candidates like Gina Callani in Texas House District 132. Every week in Katy and Cypress, we knock doors with Gina, a labor-backed candidate who is running a strong campaign in a longtime Republican district that overlaps with Congressional District 10. And just last week, we co-hosted a town hall in Sealy, Texas, with Justice of the Peace candidate Hilda Gomez and the Austin County Democratic Party. The local party chair, Pat Burns, said how happy he is that my campaign is working hard in his predominantly Republican area. And that’s the idea, behind my campaign and Beto’s campaign and others: letting folks across Texas know that we care, and that we are fighting for them. = When we contest every county and every district across Texas, we are building for a stronger future. I am running for Congress to win this seat and to represent the people of this District. But a second objective, just as important if not more so, is to do the necessary work of organizing in every community, to make sure we are ready to fight for a more democratic nation, in 2018 and beyond. We are confident we will take back the House — and perhaps the Senate too. But know that we are doing the necessary work here in Texas, and every dollar you give will help pave the way for a brighter future for all of us. We have two months to go. = Fighting for you, Mike = = = = = Paid for by Mike Siegel for Congress: PO Box 2409, Austin, TX 78701.

#
# _Democrats' Kavanaugh Tantrums Are An Embarrassment_
“Any doubt that Democrats are desperate to stall Judge Brett Kavanaugh's appointment to the Supreme Court ended Tuesday, when they made a mockery of the confirmation hearings,” writes the _Investor’s Business Daily_ editorial board. “This was nothing more than — bad — political theater.” The editors note that “while Democrats want to pretend that there is a shortage of documents available to determine how Kavanaugh will perform on the Court, he's served with distinction for 12 years on the U.S. Court of Appeals in Washington, D.C. The Supreme Court adopted 13 of his positions and overturned only one.” [**Click here to read more.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA1Ljk0NDc1ODQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNS45NDQ3NTg0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyMTI5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.investors.com/politics/editorials/kavanaugh/) “In the history of Supreme Court nominations, there is no precedent for demanding all documents from a nominee’s career,” the [**_Washington Examiner_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA1Ljk0NDc1ODQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNS45NDQ3NTg0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyMTI5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/opinion/editorials/brett-kavanaughs-confirmation-hearings-confirm-democratic-cynicism) editorial board writes. “Democrats’ real intention, although they lack the means to carry it out, is to delay confirmation until after the coming midterm elections, in hope that they can win the Senate and kill the nomination. It isn't going to happen.” “President Donald Trump's Supreme Court nominee Brett Kavanaugh testified before the Senate Judiciary Committee Tuesday to defend his record and explain his view of the law and the Constitution,” Paul Crookston writes in [**_The Washington Free Beacon_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA1Ljk0NDc1ODQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNS45NDQ3NTg0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyMTI5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://freebeacon.com/politics/kavanaugh-address-senate-committee-i-am-a-pro-law-judge/). “Kavanaugh said his judicial philosophy comes down to following the law without exception, contradicting his critics' claim that he favors corporations and conservative political interests.” In an exclusive interview with [**_The Daily Caller_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA1Ljk0NDc1ODQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNS45NDQ3NTg0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyMTI5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://dailycaller.com/2018/09/04/trump-defense-alone/), President Trump points out that he alone is fighting to reform defense pact spending that costs American taxpayers. “We’re protecting immensely wealthy countries and they’re not paying us for the protections,” President Trump says. “Why aren’t we being reimbursed for this massive cost?” “American manufacturers are on a roll: Business conditions surged in August to a 14-year high, according to a survey of industry executives,” Jeffry Bartash writes in [**_MarketWatch_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA1Ljk0NDc1ODQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNS45NDQ3NTg0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyMTI5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.marketwatch.com/story/american-manufacturers-growing-at-fastest-pace-in-14-years-ism-finds-2018-09-04). “The Institute for Supply Management said its manufacturing index jumped to a 14-year high of 61.3% last month from 58.1% in July.”
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA1Ljk0NDc1ODQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNS45NDQ3NTg0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyMTI5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA1Ljk0NDc1ODQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNS45NDQ3NTg0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyMTI5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA1Ljk0NDc1ODQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNS45NDQ3NTg0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyMTI5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

name: Heidi Heitkamp
subject: Friends, need your help!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Catherine Cortez Masto for Senate
body:
| | |
---
**Friends, The Washington Post said that my likelihood of losing just went up, **which is why my friend Senator Catherine Cortez Masto said I could reach out.

And let me be very clear: **If we lose in North Dakota, we'll lose our ONLY opportunity to take back the Senate for Democrats. **

That's why 19 groups are spending nearly $9 million to DEFEAT me and strengthen the GOP's grip on the Senate. **Now, NBC and CBS are calling me the most vulnerable Democratic senator in the entire country.**

We must raise $50,000 before our critical deadline. **If we fall short here, we'll lose our only chance to take back the Senate for Democrats. **

**Friends, I wouldn't ask if this weren't important:[Will you rush $5 or more right now to help win in North Dakota and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://ssl.catherinecortezmasto.com/page/m/1a9e562e/688a0c21/51d3b79f/73af1562/3908555254/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiY2NtNGhoIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxOTU3LWJ1LW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ccm4hh?refcode=jtk1957-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

In a race this tight, and with the future of the Senate on the line, I know that every dollar will make the difference between winning and losing.

And right now, a RealClearPolitics analysis shows me losing by less than 1 point to my opponent, Rep. Kevin Cramer. **With time running out, we're falling short of our must-hit goal. I'm counting on your immediate contribution:**

**[Please, can I count on you to rush $5 or more- every dollar you can spare - to defend North Dakota's Democratic Senate seat?](https://ssl.catherinecortezmasto.com/page/m/1a9e562e/688a0c21/51d3b79f/73af1562/3908555254/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiY2NtNGhoIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxOTU3LWJ1LW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ccm4hh?refcode=jtk1957-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
I'm so grateful. Thank you.

Heidi
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://ssl.catherinecortezmasto.com/page/m/1a9e562e/688a0c21/51d3b79f/73af1563/3908555254/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.catherinecortezmasto.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | Paid for by Catherine Cortez Masto for Senate

In the private sector, Phil Bredesen started a health care company that grew to more than 6,000 employees. As governor, he worked across party lines to fix Tennessee’s troubled Medicaid program. With Super PACs and dark money groups spending millions of dollars to lie about Governor Bredesen, it’s never been more important to have your support in keeping positive ads like this on the air. **That’s why I'm asking:**

We wanted you to be among the first to see it, and we’re hoping you can chip in $10 or whatever you can today to help us keep positive ads like this on the air. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = In the private sector, Phil Bredesen started a health care company that grew to more than 6,000 employees. As governor, he worked across party lines to fix Tennessee’s troubled Medicaid program. Now, he wants to bring his experience of bringing people together to get things done to the United States Senate to fix what’s broken in our nation’s health care system. With Super PACs and dark money groups spending millions of dollars to lie about Governor Bredesen, it’s never been more important to have your support in keeping positive ads like this on the air. That’s why I'm asking: Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can right now so we have the resources to tune out the partisan noise and keep this race focused on the issues that matter? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | In the last few months, we’ve seen so many grassroots supporters -- like you -- demanding change in Washington. It’s going to take all of us stepping up and chipping in how ever we can if we’re going to beat the status quo. Thanks for all you do, Bob Corney Campaign Manager Bredesen for Senate Paid for by Bredesen for Senate Bredesen for Senate P.O. Box 92010 Nashville, TN 37209 United States

name: Greg Stanton
subject: going against dark money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Paul Ryan and Washington special interests have been building up a war chest of _tens of millions of dollars_ over the past year to try and stop candidates like me from getting elected to Congress.

**Now, Paul Ryan 's Super PAC is spending thousands of their dark money to attack me. This is bad news.**

Look, I am running a grassroots campaign because I want to be 100% accountable to the people in my district. That means we need to double down on our small-dollar donations, given all of the dark money flooding into our election.

name: Team Menendez
subject: ADD YOUR NAME: Reject Kavanaugh
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

Since it was established, our United States Supreme Court has been the final word in cases of federal law. It was designed to be a key part of the checks and balances that are insulated from the wheeling and dealing of politics.

But now Republicans in the U.S. Senate and President Trump are using our highest court as the backbone of their extremist agenda. And Senator Bob Menendez's opponent, Bob Hugin is 100% in-line with Trump and party leadership. That includes his unwavering support for Brett Kavanaugh.

[**Donald Trump 's extremist judges are a threat to a fair and impartial justice system and must be stopped. If you agree with Democratic Senator Bob Menendez that we must reject Brett Kavanaugh, add your name today.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ccb/3af3c5d/3aa4c102/4ec3cfd2/408401798/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://menendez.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/we-must-say-no-to-kavanaugh?gpsid=5_73_3373&source=em18_180905_KavPet_engg_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180905_KavPet_engg_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1+-+Donald+Trumprsquos+extremist+judges+are+")

Just look at the rushed and egregious nomination of Neil Gorsuch, an out-of-touch extremist who Bob Hugin thought was an "excellent choice."

Kavanaugh, Trump's nominee, will threaten Roe v. Wade, toe the NRA's line, and move the court to the extreme right for a generation.

Senate Republicans have refused to properly vet Kavanaugh by withholding thousands of documents from his years in the Bush White House. Just yesterday, the morning of the first hearing, they released 42,000 pages of documents - but kept hundreds of thousands of more pages hidden, making it impossible for Kavanaugh to be properly vetted.

With a lifetime appointment on the line, what are the Republicans hiding?

[**Friend, we must stop this nomination. If you stand with Democratic Senator Bob Menendez, add your name today and join the fight to block Brett Kavanaugh.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ccb/3af3c5d/3aa4c102/4ec3cfd5/408401798/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://menendez.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/we-must-say-no-to-kavanaugh?gpsid=5_73_3373&source=em18_180905_KavPet_engg_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180905_KavPet_engg_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=2+-+FIRSTNAMEFriend+we+must+stop+this+nomina")

Thank you,

Team Menendez

[Add your name](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ccb/3af3c5d/3aa4c102/4ec3cfd4/408401798/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://menendez.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/we-must-say-no-to-kavanaugh?gpsid=5_73_3373&source=em18_180905_KavPet_engg_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180905_KavPet_engg_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name")

name: Lewis H. Cohen
subject: Time to Strike Out Steve King!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
While running a successful campaign requires many factors to come together, the glue behind that overall effort is how good the fundraising apparatus of the campaign is. After all, an effective campaign for Congress is an expensive proposition – especially if one’s opponent is Steve King. While the Scholten4Iowa campaign has outraised Steve King over the past three quarters by over a two-to-one margin, it is essential we do it again in the third quarter ending September. Right now, it is crunch time. [**_Please help us keep the fundraising momentum going by clicking here and making a contribution of whatever amount is comfortable for you right now!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2104015/10915589/-521198472?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2ExNmQ2MS0zZmIxLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMzY2YzEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x084NC38XNuUc7Sj3dzEDcKqXCHfxD8SkySOzvx83_E=)

While someone like Steve King may be down in fundraising right now, there is no doubt he will do whatever it takes to get back up again and continue his pursuit of a totally undeserved ninth term representing Iowa’s 4th District. This campaign has been up and running for over a year now and, from day one, the mission was to beat Steve King, not to simply win a primary. Well, the primary is done but the big prize of dethroning Steve King still lies ahead – 62 days ahead, to be exact. And, as J.D. would say, this is not the time to drop the ball! If anything, **it’s the time to come with the high heat, looking to strike out Steve King once and for all!** In so doing, J.D. Scholten can make it safely home to where he belongs in the House of Representatives in November and begin his official work for the people of this district – people he cares so deeply about! [**_Please let’s make sure we say “strike three, you’re out” to the 16 years of misrepresentation by Steve King by clicking here and contributing to J.D.'s movement for change in northwestern Iowa!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2104016/10915590/-521198472?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2ExNmQ2MS0zZmIxLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMzY2YzEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x084NC38XNuUc7Sj3dzEDcKqXCHfxD8SkySOzvx83_E=)
People always ask me what do we do with the money that we work so hard to raise. Well, that's a great question!
* We’ve assembled an amazing and motivated team of 15 professionals here at Team Scholten, people for whom failure is simply not an option.
* We have built a first-rate field operation comprised of 8 team members who are spread around this vast geographical district. In addition, we have a committed army of volunteers, the likes of which this district has never seen before.
* We have opened six offices throughout the district, to help spread J.D.s message of change and inclusiveness. We have also purchased 6,000 yard signs, thousands of pieces of literature, and 50 large barn signs.
* Leading up the primary, we sent out thousands of direct mail pieces and we purchased dozens of television ad spots - expenses we will be incurring again as we approach the November midterms.
* And let's not forget about the large amount of ethanol it takes to allow J.D. to continuously drive around the district in "Sioux City Sue,” the campaign RV, to meet as many voters as possible.

In short, we are doing whatever it takes to ensure victory in November but **we can't do it without your help!** We are in it to win it, period - but we need to keep the momentum going! [**_Please click here and contribute whatever you can._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2104017/10915591/-521198472?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2ExNmQ2MS0zZmIxLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMzY2YzEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x084NC38XNuUc7Sj3dzEDcKqXCHfxD8SkySOzvx83_E=) With your continued, and much appreciated support, real change is coming to IA-04 - at long last!
Standing Tall for All,
Lewis Cohen
Chief Financial Officer
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2104018/10915592/-521198472?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2ExNmQ2MS0zZmIxLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMzY2YzEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x084NC38XNuUc7Sj3dzEDcKqXCHfxD8SkySOzvx83_E=)

Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
Scholten4Iowa
P.O. Box 3531
Sioux City, IA 51102
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/b8bb086c-cbb0-e811-bce7-000d3a1366c1/f7a16d61-3fb1-e811-bce7-000d3a1366c1?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2ExNmQ2MS0zZmIxLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMzY2YzEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x084NC38XNuUc7Sj3dzEDcKqXCHfxD8SkySOzvx83_E=&id=109918160&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

name: TK 2018
subject: Trump's favorite senator (hint: it's not Tim Kaine)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek,

**We 'll start with the bad news. **

Corey Stewart has already pledged that he'll serve as a rubber stamp for President Trump's extreme agenda if he wins this election, saying _" I will be Donald Trump's favorite Senator."_

**But, Derek, it gets worse.**

Corey also says that Trump is ready to come campaign right here in our Commonwealth. _" He can't resist the temptation to come to Virginia,"_ Corey said about the president. _" He's a strong supporter of mine."_

**If Trump comes to campaign in Virginia, Derek, he 's going to go after Tim.** But you know he won't stop there: He'll attack Democrats up and down the ticket and all across the Commonwealth, too.

name: Heather Gautney, Our Revolution
subject: Got a phone and 2 minutes? Stop Kavanaugh
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
If thousands of us light up the Senate call lines, it could be enough to stop this confirmation.
#
Friends,
Despite the objection of the American people, Republicans are trying to force through the confirmation of Judge Brett Kavanaugh this week. **We need to stop Kavanaugh 's confirmation - tell your senators to vote NO.**
**[CALL YOUR SENATOR»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a97c/bed43eb/7829e16f/75fcac13/4266119535/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/stop-kavanaugh/?source=em180905-subc")**
Kavanaugh poses a threat to our rights and values - not just Roe v. Wade or his views on the Second Amendment. But on the role of money in politics, health care, labor rights, torture, and more. **Friends, we need to call our U.S. senators to oppose his confirmation before it's too late.**
[**Call your U.S. senators and tell them to vote NO on Judge Brett Kavanaugh's confirmation.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a97c/bed43eb/7829e16f/75fcac13/4266119535/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/stop-kavanaugh/?source=em180905-subc")
This fight will determine the course of this country for generations. If thousands of us light up the Senate call lines, it could be enough to stop this confirmation. Thank you for taking this critical action today.
In solidarity,
Heather Gautney
Executive Director
Our Revolution
**[CALL YOUR SENATOR»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a97c/bed43eb/7829e16f/75fcac13/4266119535/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/stop-kavanaugh/?source=em180905-subc")**

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Give me a chance to explain.
body:
I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important. |
---

| | | Good morning, In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a donation to our campaign. I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important. My opponent has a record of restricting access to the ballot box. His platform includes directing money away from public schools to private schools and refusing to expand Medicaid. **Make no mistake: A Kemp victory would be a disaster for Georgia families. So many people are counting on us to win.** Tomorrow marks exactly two months to Election Day. My team has a plan to reach out to every single Georgian before then, so everyone knows how important it is to cast a ballot. But we can't do it without your help. **We 're launching a 48-hour fundraising goal to make sure we have the resources to keep our extensive voter outreach operation going strong during these final two months. So I'm asking:** **[Can I count on you to make a $3 donation before tomorrow at midnight? I wouldn't ask if it weren't important.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa9e5/34a064cc/c3da42c/70e2f9e/2875452201/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwOTA1MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-september?refcode=IE090518-full")** This campaign is all about talking to Georgians who have been ignored by politicians. It's about making sure that every single Georgian -- no matter who they are or where they live -- knows that their voice can make a difference. We are on the verge of transforming politics in Georgia for decades to come. We can do this if all of us stand together. I know it. All my best, Stacey Abrams
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa9e5/34a064cc/c3da42c/70e2f9e/2875452201/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwOTA1MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-september?refcode=IE090518-full")**

name: ZephyrForNY.com
subject: We need to fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
They see that our campaign is surging.
#

Peter -
With just days to go, one of our opponents launched a last-minute attack ad against Zephyr trying to distort her record.
They see that our campaign is surging, and they're getting desperate. They know that we can beat them, and if we all pitch in, we're going to win.
**[Will you make a $3 donation to help us push back against our opponents' baseless attacks? We cannot do this alone.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780906/6e822e2f/1d7ac9c7/4173a174/2580325621/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA5MDUtMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-september?refcode=em180905-1-full")**
We got a preview of this at last week's debate when all of our opponents referred to Zephyr as "Professor Teachout" as if teaching is something to be ashamed of, and they're likely to keep up the personal, petty attacks at tomorrow's final debate. So with 8 days to go, we need to push harder than ever to fight back. The stakes are too high.
When we win, we will hold Trump accountable, root out corruption in Albany, take on corporate power, fight to end mass incarceration and so much more. All of that is possible, but only if we're together in this.
**[Make a $3 donation to fight back against our opponents' attacks. We've rejected all corporate money, so we depend on people like you to support our campaign.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780906/6e822e2f/1d7ac9c7/4173a174/2580325621/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA5MDUtMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-september?refcode=em180905-1-full")**
Thanks for all you do,
Team Zephyr

name: Bill (please read)
subject: here's what we're up against
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bill Nelson for U
body:
Friends - control of the Senate hinges on our race here in Florida.
| | | [](https://secure.nelsonforsenate.com/page/m/32d0ad2a/24898984/14f24484/6a8012c2/597583388/VEsH/ "https://nelsonforsenate.com/")
---
Friends - control of the Senate hinges on our race here in Florida. **POLITICO reports Democrats have **_no chance_** of taking back the Senate if Scott wins this race.** Here's what we're up against:
* NBC reports that Florida's Senate race is the **most expensive in the country**.

* Rick Scott and his extremist allies have spent a staggering **_$40 million_ against me** - and now, a recent poll shows us ******dead even.**

* We need to raise **$10,000 by midnight** to close the gap to defend Florida's critical Senate seat and take back the Senate for Democrats!

I'm in the fight of my life, friends. The only way we will defeat Scott and his right-wing mega-donors is if we hit every single fundraising goal - **but time is running out and we're falling way short.**

**Democrats CANNOT take back the Senate************if Scott wins this race, so I'm counting on you to give right now to protect Florida's Senate seat. name: Wendy H. [press secretary]
subject: they're tripling down on Minnesota
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi --
Did you see the news recently that Vice President Pence was campaigning in Minnesota _again_? In fact, it's the Administration's **third** visit to Minnesota since the end of June.
And just before that, Trump's super PAC announced they'll be spending over $3 million in Minnesota this fall.
It's no wonder CNN has called Minnesota "ground zero" in the 2018 elections.
**Now the question we face is simple: Are we going to let them "turn Minnesota red"?**
The election is in just 62 days, so we've set a one-day goal of raising $10,000 to make sure we don't fall behind pace on our fundraising. **Will you stand up by making a donation today?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

| | | Making sure you saw this. We need to organize ASAP to oppose Kavanaugh's Supreme Court nomination.

[**We still need 4,000 to sign on in opposition to Kavanaugh. _Begin original message:_

**ALERT: Senate hearings for Brett Kavanaugh are today**

We're launching a rapid response effort to fight back against confirming the president's extreme nominee and losing the Supreme Court for a generation. Will you be one of the 10,000 signers we need in the next 48 hours?

[**SIGN ON IF YOU AGREE: We can 't afford to have Kavanaugh on the Supreme Court!**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b763/43d8135f/6726080e/5100144d/4131701725/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/stand-against-kavanaugh-now?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+SIGN+ON+IF+YOU+AGREE+We+canrsquot+afford&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180905_1_2&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180905_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180905_1_2")

* * *

Today is the first day of hearings for Supreme Court nominee Brett Kavanaugh, and one thing is already clear: he has a lot of extreme views that are dangerously out of touch with most Americans.

The stakes are too high -- we can't sit by while Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell install a Supreme Court justice who will advance their extreme conservative agenda and roll back decades of progress on women's rights, voting rights, health care, and workers' rights.

[**In response to today 's hearings, we're working to gather 10,000 signatures in the next 48 hours to show Republicans that Americans are united against confirming President Trump's Supreme Court pick. SIGN ON NOW ->**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b763/43d8135f/6726080e/5100144c/4131701725/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/stand-against-kavanaugh-now?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+In+response+to+todayrsquos+hearings+wers&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180905_1_2&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180905_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180905_1_2")
**[SAY NO TO KAVANAUGH](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b763/43d8135f/6726080e/5100144f/4131701725/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/stand-against-kavanaugh-now?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+SAY+NO+TO+KAVANAUGH&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180905_1_2&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180905_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180905_1_2")** President Trump has nominated an extreme conservative who will shift the balance of the court for a generation. It's not enough to just oppose Kavanaugh -- we have to show Republicans how strong our opposition is.

Why? Because **there is too much at stake for us to do anything less.**

[**That 's why we need you to raise your voice with us. Add your name here and be one of the 10,000 supporters we need to stand against confirming Brett Kavanaugh!**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b763/43d8135f/6726080e/5100144e/4131701725/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/stand-against-kavanaugh-now?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Thatrsquos+why+we+need+you+to+raise+your&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180905_1_2&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180905_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180905_1_2") **[OPPOSE KAVANAUGH](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b763/43d8135f/6726080e/51001471/4131701725/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/stand-against-kavanaugh-now?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+OPPOSE+KAVANAUGH&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180905_1_2&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180905_1_2&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180905_1_2")** Thanks for your support,

name: =?utf-8?Q?Joan=C3=A9_McAfee?=
subject: This plan doesn't work without you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Five more from your area.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4ad6f/c1f7015/6df06977/1141e22a/2865053173/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180905_em-vol&recurring=auto") Friend, We will face attacks from special interests, Republican super PACs, dark money organizations, and from the White House -- but we can defeat them if we all do our part. If we reach out, talk to voters, tell them what's at stake and have those person-to-person conversations that make the difference in close elections like this one. **[We're organizing in Sturgeon Lake and we need your help. Can you sign up here as a volunteer and an organizer will reach out with how you can get involved?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4ad6f/c1f7015/6df06977/1141e22b/2865053173/VEsE/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/volunteer?source=rtw_20180905_em-vol")** Tina likes to say there are no red or blue waves, there's just hard work. And I couldn't agree more. There is no way Democrats keep Minnesota blue and win in November without a record number of volunteers pitching in to do everything they can. This means we need your help, friend. **[Will you make sure we win in November by signing up as a volunteer? We still need at least 5 more signups from your area to talk to every voter we need to win.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4ad6f/c1f7015/6df06977/1141e22b/2865053173/VEsF/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/volunteer?source=rtw_20180905_em-vol")** Thank you for signing up! Joane McAfee
Political Director **[Contribute](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4ad6f/c1f7015/6df06977/1141e22a/2865053173/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180905_em-vol&recurring=auto")**

name: Todd Cheewing
subject: Bedford Breakfast Bash!
body:
Derek, In just under a week, Granite State Republicans will be going to the polls to vote in our state's primary. clean_body: Derek, In just under a week, Granite State Republicans will be going to the polls to vote in our state's primary. While the primary is quickly approaching, this means that our is also right around the corner! Thursday, September 13th, 2018 7:30 AMBedford Village Inn2 Olde Bedford WayBedford, New Hampshire When we unite in September, we will win in November! Looking forward to seeing you on the 13th! Sincerely, Todd CheewingNHGOP Executive Director | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

name: jessalyn reid
subject: this weekend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | hello! what are you doing this weekend?

the VA coordinated campaign is having [a huge weekend of action](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1132/3e0906/72831c14/3e36c147/660868871/VEsH/ "https://timkaine.com/events/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+a+huge+weekend+of+action&utm_campaign=20180904_3_FIELD_JR_Weekend-of-Action&source=20180904_3_FIELD_JR_Weekend-of-Action#/"), and you should definitely go. it'll be a great time - i'm talking canvass training, walk packets, door knocking, maybe even a doughnut or two. plus that great feeling of knowing that you didn't spend your weekend listening to another political podcast, or reading another column, or checking twitter - instead you got out there and *did something* that will really and truly help elect more Democrats. wild!

a couple ways to sign up:
1. we have a [(brand new!) event search tool on the website](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1132/3e0906/72831c14/3e36c146/660868871/VEsE/ "https://timkaine.com/events/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+brand+new+event+search+tool+on+the+websi&utm_campaign=20180904_3_FIELD_JR_Weekend-of-Action&source=20180904_3_FIELD_JR_Weekend-of-Action#/") that's super easy to use. you just zoom with the map, or enter your ZIP, and find whatever event you want to go to. boom!
2. if that's too stressful (i get it), [just add your name here](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1132/3e0906/72831c14/3e36c145/660868871/VEsF/ "https://timkaine.com/volunteer/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+just+add+your+name+here&utm_campaign=20180904_3_FIELD_JR_Weekend-of-Action&source=20180904_3_FIELD_JR_Weekend-of-Action") \- and a field organizer near you will get in touch!

cannot thank you enough for signing up for a shift during this weekend of action. i'm going to be hitting the sidewalk too, and it's always nice to know i'm not alone.

you're the best!

-jess
TK 4 VA digital director

p.s. if you want to make me even happier, grab a selfie of yourself volunteering and post it up somewhere your friends will see! democratic enthusiasm is contagious, so spreading the love online is like the cherry on top of your activist sundae.

---

name: Mara Boggs
subject: Grassroots Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
body:
Team Manchin is heading into September with a ton of momentum. Joe and the campaign are traveling all over the state asking voters a simple question: who can you trust more to do what's best for West Virginia, Joe Manchin or Patrick Morrisey?

It's a simple answer: Joe Manchin.

Joe will always do what's best for our state. It's why we have such strong support from Democrats, Republicans, and Independents in every corner of the state.

Here's a short rundown of what's been happening on the campaign trail.

Joe Leads In New Poll

Another poll released by MetroNews confirms that Joe Manchin is beating Patrick Morrisey by 8% to 13%. That's a margin larger than a sell out crowd at Mountaineer Field!

This is great news, but we won't stop working to win over every voter we can.

Educators Endorse Joe

This week West Virginia's educators unanimously endorsed Joe Manchin. [Click here to watch and share the video we released about Joe's commitment to education.](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4w3nz3AbA71RcXJPuLNXO3Zp%2bFP6%2by8yB0Vxxw6UoXXfAj1cr1gW6fogXHMyesLjCmkqTFck8FMDbWJLFOYiTMksi%2b1N9mgb5JXYdezLYeiPHexEITRrrLY%3d)
[](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4w3nz3AbA71RcXJPuLNXO3Zp%2bFP6%2by8yB0Vxxw6UoXXfAj1cr1gW6fogXHMyesLjCmkqTFck8FMDbWJLFOYiTMksi%2b1N9mgb5JXYdezLYeiPHexEITRrrLY%3d "Click here to watch!")

Manchin earned the support of the West Virginia Education Association (WVEA), the American Federation of Teachers-West Virginia (AFT-WV), and the West Virginia School Service Personnel Association (WVSSPA).

Following this year's strike, Mountain State educators are fired up to support Manchin's efforts to ensure a strong education system in West Virginia, and oppose Patrick Morrisey's efforts to lock up educators during the 2018 strike. [Learn more here.](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC49dv5qke%2fMhftpSFNOxGBAv8I8zlZbR%2boNfEz4IuqGYHANvPNXq65zjqfo25SpeQ7qZ9aN6N7DR53tKZSOuWC4SSnwqTYTFYm4XofrVT87UfUd8JIelTWrXOQF6Ej%2fIHadDdODF4gzmY)

Hot on the Trail

Over Labor Day weekend, Joe and the Manchin team were all over West Virginia taking our message directly to the people.

Joe visited the Annual Italian Heritage Festival Parade in Clarksburg, a major Labor Day event in Mannington, served as the parade marshal for the Marmet Labor Day parade, and stopped by the 80th Annual UMWA Labor Day celebration.

Pre-Existing Conditions In the News

Last week in Martinsburg, WV, Joe met with Noelle Ward and her brother to discuss coverage for people with pre-existing conditions. [Watch the story on WDVM.](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4xvlHofxv9cxhDTIKFQ09GzUyvguwKeswftoEMmGQ2ID3VJB1FwRftnBIfSmFKZk%2bbyAr6TYH6WE1fD3o8855SYcmNUyZDAZLAFKj1388%2fdJreI%2f%2fLfg%2blk%2bKSl3VQAz2X1qCUv%2f6AUQT9IHw%2bKQLg8%3d)

Noelle is a 9th grader with diabetes, and she spoke to Joe about Patrick Morrisey's lawsuit to try and take away coverage for people with pre-existing conditions.

Debates

Our campaign accepted two statewide debates, one in Wheeling on October 14 and one in Morgantown on November 1. So far, Pat Morrisey has refused to accept the Wheeling debate hosted by local newspapers. [Learn more here](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC49dv5qke%2fMhftpSFNOxGBAufSZUNSWoivhX3uzLTh17ykS8FFQd2U4vrLHA14K88PUJa7q2Na8iGIHYhDAP%2f4Jlw%2fTwH0osqy2rhQEu9wlYuzRqtTuFh2qlI8CmhgF6W6hgmsqn6D80xUJ%2bZlHDF0WgNSmGvvRAg%2bHI6QNhQTbaX).

Morrisey is thumbing his nose at the media by trying to dodge the October 14 debate in Wheeling with the major newspapers across West Virginia. Morrisey won't commit to a debate that is open to the public and includes journalists who know West Virginia's issues the best because he knows he can't defend his lawsuit that would allow insurance companies to deny coverage for 800,000 West Virginians with pre-existing conditions.

The 2018 Manchin Campaign Song
West Virginia native John Ellison repurposed his world-famous song "Some Kind of Wonderful" for the Manchin campaign. The song, "Some Kind of Senator" was unveiled at the Charleston Moose Lodge on Friday night in front of long-time Manchin friends and supporters.
[Click here to listen to John Ellison's "Some Kind of Senator."](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC4w3nz3AbA71RcXJPuLNXO3Zp%2bFP6%2by8yB0Vxxw6UoXXfSzpGbSSiOgkMpQAT6ntOaMNVFjLv0iWKRxQCudMtERKmulCElYOf30Uq%2fSzhlYuLZUXz6bxGNP0VUe%2bUZydVv5CzCEUx9Yvqg3BRhld7%2fYY%3d)

Thank you for all of your support.

Mara Boggs
Campaign Manager
Manchin for West Virginia

Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia

P.O. Box 5202
Charleston, WV 25361
[](https://images.myngp.com/LinkTracker.aspx?crypt=IVi0ax2%2b6UDLpC3olJXC457kkjv9LkTjvDXRuLbXMKT3SLPHL8f66seeqvDN0HKv0yZtvicTJBHji0Rx3fpXm%2fh2PIGbpA56ZmM8ZFXvbp1NGeD8qcDsppJfQufYNAiO%2f3aS9exDIfkrJvKpXwGwZepfMcl%2fPC52OeGWp291I0%2bDCcO4C5A3Zwc%2f8cd0ac5QlLFZLwNrer6bODmnkCsR6mQBZfCKZFVCBlqH8xQRbhIIVKwDMxFxNDaAz7igWaxiYuewS9OF7CQ%3d)

subject: One year ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
|

| **September 5, 2017:** Trump moves to end DACA after months of increasingly cruel immigration policies.

**September 5, 2018:** We _still_ don't have a permanent solution to help DREAMers, and Trump-puppets like Ron DeSantis and Rick Scott want to advance Trump's extremist policies to Florida.

[**Stand with Florida Democrats and oppose Trump 's extremist immigration policies today ->**](http://act.floridadems. "https://act.floridadems.org/page/s/add-your-name-to-condemn-trump-s-immigration-policies?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+Stand+with+Florida+Democrats+and+oppose+&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180905_1_1&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180905_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180905_1_1")
* * *
FIRST it was the travel ban on people from Muslim-majority countries.

THEN it was targeting DACA and using DREAMers as political pawns.

NOW it's separating children from their families at the border.

[**It 's been one year since Trump moved to end DACA, and that's why we're organizing to send a message that Floridians oppose Trump's increasingly cruel and racist immigration policies. SIGN ON TO JOIN US ->**](http://act.floridadems. "https://act.floridadems.org/page/s/add-your-name-to-condemn-trump-s-immigration-policies?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+Itrsquos+been+one+year+since+Trump+moved&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180905_1_1&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180905_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180905_1_1")

DREAMers are teachers, nurses, and small-business owners helping make our country better. _In Florida alone, they contribute over $1.5 billion to our economy._

But since Trump's decision last September, hundreds of thousands of DREAMers have faced a legal limbo as they fight to stay in the only country they know.

[**That 's why we're organizing on this anniversary to oppose Trump's terrible immigration policies. Add your name today ->**](http://act.floridadems. "https://act.floridadems.org/page/s/add-your-name-to-condemn-trump-s-immigration-policies?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+Thatrsquos+why+wersquore+organizing+on+t&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180905_1_1&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180905_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180905_1_1")

Thanks for stepping up.

Florida Democrats

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: The story Bob Woodward didn’t tell
body:
| |
---
The White House • September 5, 2018
# The story Bob Woodward didn’t tell
##
##
**The Washington power circuit** loves insider baseball—stories that spread gossip, flatter the egos of political operatives, and give pundits new fodder for columns or TV hits. It doesn’t matter if the stories are true; it just matters that they don’t force the reader to think too much. **“While I generally enjoy reading fiction** , this is a uniquely Washington brand of literature, and his anonymous sources do not lend credibility,” [**Defense Secretary General James Mattis said**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA1Ljk0NTEwMjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNS45NDUxMDI3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyNDQwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://dod.defense.gov/News/News-Releases/News-Release-View/Article/1619961/statement-by-secretary-of-defense-james-n-mattis/) of Bob Woodward’s upcoming book. “The contemptuous words about the President attributed to me in Woodward's book were never uttered by me or in my presence.” **Right on cue** , the Beltway media will feast on this tabloid gossip while ignoring results that actually matter to the more than 300 million Americans this Administration serves. Just a few of those results:
* More Americans now employed than ever recorded in our history
* Manufacturing jobs growing at the fastest rate in more than 3 decades
* Coal exports up 60 percent and U.S. oil production hitting an all-time high
* Breakthrough [**trade deals-in-principle**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA1Ljk0NTEwMjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNS45NDUxMDI3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyNDQwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-keeping-promise-renegotiate-nafta/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) with Mexico and the E.U.
* Median household income hitting the highest level ever recorded

**And that’s just the economy.** On defense, there’s the near-total destruction of ISIS’ self-declared caliphate. On diplomacy, at least 17 American detainees have been returned on President Trump’s watch. And the list goes on. **[See a list of results—the story that Bob Woodward didn’t tell.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA1Ljk0NTEwMjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNS45NDUxMDI3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyNDQwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/trump-administration-accomplishments/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) ** **News that matters** : [**Working Americans are prospering under President Trump**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA1Ljk0NTEwMjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNS45NDUxMDI3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyNDQwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/american-workers-prospering-president-donald-j-trump/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
## On Judge Kavanaugh, Democrats tip their hand
##
**Several Democratic Senators** want to suspend Judge Brett Kavanaugh's Supreme Court confirmation hearing this week because they claim to need more information about the nominee. Here’s the problem: Those same Senators apparently had enough information just hours after Judge Kavanaugh’s nomination in July to state their intent to vote against him. **When it comes to actual substance,** as day two of the confirmation hearing unfolds, Judge Kavanaugh continues to show why he’s among the most qualified High Court nominees in history. Throughout a day of questioning—some legitimate, some political theater—he has calmly explained the importance of separation of powers, precedent, and the principle of equality under the law. **“No one seriously questions** Kavanaugh's qualification to serve on the Court,” the _Investor’s Business Daily_ editorial board writes this week. “But stunts are all Democrats have left.” [**Why Judge Kavanaugh is exceptionally qualified to serve**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA1Ljk0NTEwMjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNS45NDUxMDI3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyNDQwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/judge-brett-m-kavanaugh-exceptionally-qualified-deserving-nominee-supreme-court/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **Investor’s Business Daily** : [**Democrats’ tantrums are “an embarrassment”**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA1Ljk0NTEwMjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNS45NDUxMDI3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyNDQwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.investors.com/politics/editorials/kavanaugh/)
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
**President Donald J. Trump welcomes the Amir of the State of Kuwait to the White House** | September 5, 2018
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA1Ljk0NTEwMjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNS45NDUxMDI3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyNDQwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA1Ljk0NTEwMjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNS45NDUxMDI3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyNDQwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA1Ljk0NTEwMjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNS45NDUxMDI3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyNDQwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&108&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

Throughout a day of questioning—some legitimate, some political theater—he has calmly explained the importance of separation of powers, precedent, and the principle of equality under the law. “No one seriously questions Kavanaugh's qualification to serve on the Court,” the Investor’s Business Daily editorial board writes this week. “But stunts are all Democrats have left.” Investor’s Business Daily : Photo of the Day Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian President Donald J. Trump welcomes the Amir of the State of Kuwait to the White House** | September 5, 2018 | | The White House · 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, NW · Washington DC 20500 · 202-456-1111

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Washington's the best in the nation for workers:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Republicans think workers' rights are bad for the economy. We're proving them wrong.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd783aa/2f5ea88d/75c74341/2cbc503c/3647189673/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wa-workers-rights?utm_source=ema_2018-09-05_workers-rights&refcode=ema_2018-09-05_workers-rights&utm_campaign=workers-rights&utm_medium=ema") Dear Friend, I hope you had a restful Labor Day weekend. On Monday, I reflected upon all that working people have done to build our country -- their contributions have forged the backbone of our infrastructure, the strength of our industry, and the fairness of our laws. And that's why I'm so proud to tell you today that Oxfam America just ranked Washington the best state in the country for workers.1 On wage policies, worker protections, and workers' rights, Washington excels above all other states. We protect equal pay, support pregnant workers, and prohibit discriminatory pay secrecy. And our landmark paid medical and family leave program provides up to 12 weeks of paid leave -- the most progressive policy in the nation. A huge reason why Washington state is a great place for workers is thanks to our labor unions. Our unions, and the workers who make them strong, fight every day for higher wages, better benefits, and strong workplace protections. Here in Washington state, we're making sure they're winning that fight. Again and again, we're defeating the Republican myth that progressive policies are bad for business. Not only are we the #1 state economy in the country, according to _Business Insider_ 2 \-- we're the #1 state for workers. Good labor laws and a good economy are not at odds with each other, no matter what Republicans would have you think -- in fact, they're entirely connected. Washington businesses thrive when they invest in their employees. The other Washington should take a look at the example we're setting! I'm so proud that Washington was just named the Best State to Work -- and I look forward to continuing to support our workers as one of the most progressive states in the country. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd783aa/2f5ea88d/75c74341/2cbc503c/3647189673/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wa-workers-rights?utm_source=ema_2018-09-05_workers-rights&refcode=ema_2018-09-05_workers-rights&utm_campaign=workers-rights&utm_medium=ema")
---

* * *
1 Oxfam America. (2018). _The Best States to Work Index._ Retrieved from [https://policy-practice.oxfamamerica.org/static/media/files/Best_States_to_Work_Index.pdf](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd783aa/2f5ea88d/75c74341/2cbc5033/3647189673/VEsF/ "https://policy-practice.oxfamamerica.org/static/media/files/Best_States_to_Work_Index.pdf")
2 Kiersz, A. (2018, March 15). Every US state economy ranked from worst to best. _Business Insider._ Retrieved from [https://www.businessinsider.com/state-economy-ranking-q1-2018-2](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd783aa/2f5ea88d/75c74341/2cbc5032/3647189673/VEsC/ "https://www.businessinsider.com/state-economy-ranking-q1-2018-2")

name: Leah Vukmir
subject: Tell Tammy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
If you needed another example of how Tammy Baldwin is failing to represent our Wisconsin values, just turn on your TV.

Friend,

If you needed another example of how Tammy Baldwin is failing to represent our Wisconsin values, just turn on your TV.

Our nominee to the Supreme Court, Judge Brett Kavanaugh, is going through the Senate confirmation process this week and the way Tammy and her Democratic allies are treating him, you’d think he was a criminal on trial – not up to serve on our highest court!

The Resist movement and Senate Democrats have reached new lows. They’re distracting, obstructing, and completely neglecting their job to confirm our nominees. And Tammy Baldwin is following suit with every outrageous move.

Now, it’s time for us to tell Tammy Baldwin to do her job and confirm Kavanaugh.

[ADD YOUR NAME: CONFIRM KAVANAUGH](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=dca7f9b317744b4ca4cae767fb97155e&_e=oic8y5pzKTd53x1KMYmaZaxIVcmwwmCKugr-B9pV7eJqnJradg6J-ZDvbEa8bq4qoN2dKXONfkt8EjYZaPHFNfi326tRiGti0Fi5iWZHvJFH6n3Ckj4kO2A98-SNhBIgnKxtksVmLR8ttxDv6iKo2_Mq-Ugfk1_vHwYyNAeXG6LJ6WUygr1JhVPia2E8_sXxvutM23bdsocNGIiI5iPvhk0zxmwQuzGTglV9pbLBUupbBm1vrleHKgD_2XW_GbOR0jNb28SnF2M8MtUQ71jcFj-RqlF7GzkRTQPEQ37vzyNpLiVcBg36IWxbXXpS7QgW4_h1zpMXtzXQoOPtz4Gd226pz-yETmRZnfH-oYMLKCYfvbyYFniYfsZPMXMg9U33upuhVOZBUSurJhe31Kc8YBDn5Mu-YXsiMUGvDlHUtIm3zeZ8XDYmZkks8zuFZV2K)
---

Friend, these tactics are not how we get things done in Wisconsin.

Heck, Tammy Baldwin wouldn’t even meet with Judge Kavanaugh before saying she’d vote no! That’s certainly not the Wisconsin Way.

By obstructing the confirmation process, liberals are obstructing the American people AGAIN.

Politicians like Tammy Baldwin won’t take on the establishment and stand up for you, your rights, or YOUR Supreme Court nominee.

_But friend, I always will fight for you, our values and the middle class._

In the Senate, I will work to give Wisconsin a voice when talking with presidential appointees, and I will vote to confirm qualified nominees so we can get things DONE for America.

I’m tired of Washington not working for us, but if Tammy wins in November... we’ll only have to deal with more ineffective obstructionists preventing America’s success.

We can’t let that happen. We have to make sure we win in November. And right now, we need to make sure Judge Kavanaugh is confirmed for the Supreme Court: **[https://leahvukmir.com/support-judge-kavanaugh/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=dca7f9b317744b4ca4cae767fb97155e&_e=oic8y5pzKTd53x1KMYmaZaxIVcmwwmCKugr-B9pV7eJqnJradg6J-ZDvbEa8bq4qoN2dKXONfkt8EjYZaPHFNfi326tRiGti0Fi5iWZHvJFH6n3Ckj4kO2A98-SNhBIgnKxtksVmLR8ttxDv6iKo2_Mq-Ugfk1_vHwYyNAeXG6LJ6WUygr1JhVPia2E8_sXxvutM23bdsocNGIiI5iPvhjQRrJnVaAc-ognnsyy9QNTEj8DEUUl6Vy9nYUlQOaRKR78xz-86dU8TTU5JOETTpjgsyanTI_ajuWpzKBBShF-NLz2yldZKBl4lCpO2ZKUhV-Ja4Gy3kqgtRBj6IGAvmRG10xNIvBAPLgr9X1TsWO6aFxOpxrLVSbFE2R4PLiCS_y3dsmiQEK3jAzL0AieGVmpU0NtSBDCIn-jPv29ersC0V66DqeyQrIh9A4NBBOFi)**

Let’s tell Tammy Baldwin and anyone else who’s listening that Wisconsinites deserve effective leadership – not obstruction. It’s time to confirm!
[ADD YOUR NAME >>>](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=dca7f9b317744b4ca4cae767fb97155e&_e=oic8y5pzKTd53x1KMYmaZaxIVcmwwmCKugr-B9pV7eJqnJradg6J-ZDvbEa8bq4qoN2dKXONfkt8EjYZaPHFNfi326tRiGti0Fi5iWZHvJFH6n3Ckj4kO2A98-SNhBIgnKxtksVmLR8ttxDv6iKo2_Mq-Ugfk1_vHwYyNAeXG6LJ6WUygr1JhVPia2E8_sXxvutM23bdsocNGIiI5iPvhuwFnTM_u1fTFLc1efDtjr0wc_KUgdO_03mK3Ny5nOMFzjWANY1HA5OijhT8wI4MqE2ASl3UMFYxhVVYe0wxpygulo_cQSX4nm7TYNPLDFE67TEDc3rAoN260oO6OH7FYUQl1aw2PQDxpJr-f3EGmpA2-ZOE4gEJBxpKs-ibwxXslJ5pkwOELWR5buvaGpEVjgYeEiOp-bfF40-3MFVpbCqyPi6SIVXZGVAMo9kLq3GN)

Leah

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=dca7f9b317744b4ca4cae767fb97155e&_e=oic8y5pzKTd53x1KMYmaZVs5yQqXMl0FCYgDOdNtJtCaTKv3RLAFT3Hbyl3x4G32JysH9UadlK1PM8Dyuc0OP7VDrzMuLOHOmlcF0bmfsq-DXATGlUN8hC4eZ23B3IvO3FSK9d-L-l_koYji5x9KZ6lDXDmSFJGXBN8MSSaKz8M4n73tsRAwuKcBYiH-Gl9Zj3_hqwNF4qo7Z7r40lzRI-FNaIDIeHDjUVUGhNn0Rg8QfcWPPEOrsQHT-HWWKMTj4AjDQ2QEumon8rPLwyZ0hQ%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=dca7f9b317744b4ca4cae767fb97155e&_e=oic8y5pzKTd53x1KMYmaZQJfaJ-gNz_9T2QKrt_rtPDP-mRQNIZQ7Pw3Vafep4a4eFy8mY5w8la4rC1AiIPfpvxUzDxvngpzS1GVLK_zRWOvrP-DDfcTvbdYIdgCpvXTUOQJJ2PpYRuyRlcwOP_Jf6ScvXlopXh3HJIO_i22Pkat3hB2k0fih-xniAyjs4ba28uc3noDGbwgT7iSEC-AZOXQ8jcNVZvDvbVng5Scs68klqfo4tyZKHYwHfgrCMF6fT5ttsDr9rTPs_zLSaS4sQ%3D%3D)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=dca7f9b317744b4ca4cae767fb97155e&_e=DL6c5R0ta8ReaG73rpjHR-Sl16PrL_dxx-Pcw0valQHMJZTI2IVRcPg9d7l4YFqObKKGmBJW6qS8ojjXKXGV4R2pRPp1wNJHx_P-YQDO6O8dKWx77cMYChkG0nZpvz4bEC2nwnVXiPcDeoqkUTA5gQaWLs0HIH6ISq0KZQRAICT-nQKTLrO_baPQXILhazKrT3mJqhFNiob9kBJQ5EQ61L3yvzcKuYTnifWVzHf3pyAlPo-dWI6mMsr2fn83duVq). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=dca7f9b317744b4ca4cae767fb97155e&_e=oic8y5pzKTd53x1KMYmaZQLbA6DlcQ1lObH_ni2tW9C6rW3fTg2Nq2Q-c-MW9lwdlVsi-1FV0kXlinK5sAsW4jqPvmMH3GQsEwRgGCqex7Fbx1Mr7uz5nQmKh1VoLhs8WNA4BcSYMcvMIxJlmW2i8kNZ6vepU_ayahuRJp0qfhKyml2TQJpB45rQH4a4FPTUjHedeFMofaIPC68n9NG0cbYxuigSiAV8QoAWvpZieVgWO6WalFz1dAvyW-VBa9JZ7D189WzoYOq5X2O7EylRT-6UUcTcCxAKD_N1C1u_WtYUogv1TTj7Au0e7yFioBkYk-SF7rsULNkcnaNs3rG-mmVM92jfkzfdy8ZHv2oaX6Pd8VqLDzyo1jA60-kh8H7y) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=dca7f9b317744b4ca4cae767fb97155e&_e=oic8y5pzKTd53x1KMYmaZQLbA6DlcQ1lObH_ni2tW9Di4cay_3pxMj3rKqDE7IWi5NN1j8yz6rbSfrGXOwOmufD9rGika7lwz87hQ3CCgi4w-MKXFsDQ7u_CIPWiL-rGO4HtLesoUkqCBZd3BeEHqrvidar6oib3PxvP-XcUEGCiFe07F9R_T2xEwNUlO6fM_1l90rk2TD7CIA9H_3NJGb7-wbizAl5LLLlHgLjxJDpl9GjsIfBKYFYanXUFGMDcZWCzxJGZE7sxF96NEuLLJdLFF8kJk5ZBseprmxU4IRaiz9TF3ZpZqq9CoM_oRLCIi3KLP7p6Wgu6SQ-5shf9oI6KkpafMHsJZY-tXqibfvRip1i-XqIq1m32PhGhjsza) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=dca7f9b317744b4ca4cae767fb97155e&_e=oic8y5pzKTd53x1KMYmaZVs5yQqXMl0FCYgDOdNtJtCaTKv3RLAFT3Hbyl3x4G32ILyrbF8DYkqrh12O7nc-w_I0ZpwXHt5nUMEiG5UrsDGUvcILTS8hh5OZWsz_-4F25s9L17bQX9ju2eIQkqpQEahZEPc8zZpF057Iu-CiBJTYF56vytO1-gjpqwaoRXjL2YLDThiMUaC1rraMqgc1s4aCxBO-GhSRe_vAAFt8tSjZMLM5vdb_Rs712EYhOlEdXxmR-Ji0hVIMp5mdGL4VeQ%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=dca7f9b317744b4ca4cae767fb97155e&_e=oic8y5pzKTd53x1KMYmaZQJfaJ-gNz_9T2QKrt_rtPDP-mRQNIZQ7Pw3Vafep4a4R9Glr5ffu9vmwTGu9RgTWXTVE9gNXImd5UL-oWXdVh3rVoA-dAMLDyVrnF4hFfnwKt5C9jEYGLA8ue84Zbi7r_EpA_mUi_oD2SphjQj0TCEPb-5h5zibaspr3Ou_Jkmro4d3ldzMvJrP49C3txtGUlOgWI8-4vTi384H-6yfsMzTWXWuw66vhiTfL2dd4JO9OzPb7E79uKsWkgx_Q9ByQg%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=dca7f9b317744b4ca4cae767fb97155e&_e=oic8y5pzKTd53x1KMYmaZdG83deI_3tLBYZOBO3ufDeQq5h8lMEUc8TJ4IQd-aI1KyHBcUXiPQfNh5gN8kJfJIjQV0-1MhRE71mSyRZxJSed2qRQPj-Xv98pCE4yylP6Ztiqfo9lKyslK9yGXnTQRebFJjzqPUTBBaIB14xDhEY_9wzqM26sCLyI0Wxtc19gwFGllFGNAhpZDOPkHm3p0KhdzXq95cP04U-frZ-GlpbVNyKK3_qH90hR7NYFh0ZOjN_2bQu4I3mB_Y4Od_h4yw%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=dca7f9b317744b4ca4cae767fb97155e&_e=oic8y5pzKTd53x1KMYmaZQLbA6DlcQ1lObH_ni2tW9Co3oCeLCk2aU5dSJhO0jRK8quYpZ15BFR8uHMG0LqXIwzDSottvgr-xAVTcEIdul-j7cnz7e-DsElJch7PfiHsHl-ilDCVx-GjQQz2CuNnlsdVjjXTCHalaa7L5PsczcliqFk4mjvakt8hclYmLPN1Ftlq5_uAF5O-ZLpPn-n4lnH4T2WC4Z_b0BH78r7gmY14zjImrK9DYKYJUOgGEqg71Ut6vM5BazoIhf2SHfOD8KfxgdELX4TC1sBf3F-ezJsy5a46JaqcYVCvV_XvHIzWhMT775tguUpRKPLab0sLeNbNjpZ8FLCnbt03je3U2B6litaUuvyDO0oLPpGiesDEh-XZ31KIYT7XcdNk9Z325A%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. clean_body: If you needed another example of how Tammy Baldwin is failing to represent our Wisconsin values, just turn on your TV. Friend, If you needed another example of how Tammy Baldwin is failing to represent our Wisconsin values, just turn on your TV. Our nominee to the Supreme Court, Judge Brett Kavanaugh, is going through the Senate confirmation process this week and the way Tammy and her Democratic allies are treating him, you’d think he was a criminal on trial – not up to serve on our highest court! The Resist movement and Senate Democrats have reached new lows. They’re distracting, obstructing, and completely neglecting their job to confirm our nominees. And Tammy Baldwin is following suit with every outrageous move. Now, it’s time for us to tell Tammy Baldwin to do her job and confirm Kavanaugh. Friend, these tactics are not how we get things done in Wisconsin. Heck, Tammy Baldwin wouldn’t even meet with Judge Kavanaugh before saying she’d vote no! That’s certainly not the Wisconsin Way. By obstructing the confirmation process, liberals are obstructing the American people AGAIN. Politicians like Tammy Baldwin won’t take on the establishment and stand up for you, your rights, or YOUR Supreme Court nominee. But friend, I always will fight for you, our values and the middle class. In the Senate, I will work to give Wisconsin a voice when talking with presidential appointees, and I will vote to confirm qualified nominees so we can get things DONE for America. I’m tired of Washington not working for us, but if Tammy wins in November... we’ll only have to deal with more ineffective obstructionists preventing America’s success. We can’t let that happen. We have to make sure we win in November. And right now, we need to make sure Judge Kavanaugh is confirmed for the Supreme Court: Let’s tell Tammy Baldwin and anyone else who’s listening that Wisconsinites deserve effective leadership – not obstruction. It’s time to confirm! Thanks, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

subject: here's the bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:

This is huge, friends.

**But here's the bad news:** You can bet Sununu's wealthy corporate backers are going to start pouring even more money into this race now. They have deep pockets and aren't afraid to buy this election for the GOP.
