subject: 📺 WATCH: our first TV ad! 📺
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
It's a big day here at O'Halleran HQ: We're going up on TV with our first ad of the general election!
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633f9f/1a8421e1/1a5ad2e6f/48f725b1/1760254397/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Friends, It's a big day here at O'Halleran HQ: **_We 're going up on TV with_** **_[our first ad](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ohalleranad12018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.05_b1_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") of the general election!_** **[Quick, take a minute to watch the ad -- and then make a grassroots donation, so we can share it with every single voter in AZ-01!](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ohalleranad12018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.05_b1_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** [](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ohalleranad12018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.05_b1_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") We're really proud of this ad, friends, and it's important that we share it far and wide. It's about Tom's record and his promise to be an independent voice for Arizona families in Congress, _and we are confident that voters will re-elect him once they hear about everything Tom has been doing for our community._ Like Tom says in the video, Congress isn't serving us, and we need his independent voice there, standing up for hardworking Arizonans. **Tom will never forget the people he 's in Washington to serve -- _YOU!_** **[Please, watch the video. And then chip in, because Tom is the most vulnerable Democrat in the House, and we need YOUR help to keep this ad running and then WIN in November!](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ohalleranad12018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.05_b1_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks, Team O'Halleran | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ohalleranad12018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.05_b1_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633f9f/1a8421e1/1a5ad2e6f/48f725b3/1760254397/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000").**_**
** **

name: Brad Elkins (via MartinHeinrich.com)
subject: Nob Hill Canvass Kick-Off with Martin!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | Friend,

As one of Martin's top supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that Martin will be kicking off our Nob Hill canvass this weekend! We need volunteers to help knock on doors and make calls, and we hope you'll be one of them! I've included the event details below:

**Event:** Nob Hill Canvass Kick-off!
**When:** Sunday, September 9th, 1:00 pm
**Where:** Nob Hill New Mexico For All Organizing Office. 3901 Central Ave NE. Albuquerque, NM 87108
**[RSVP here->](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b760/43d8135f/67296fdf/5100155f/4229242906/VEsH/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/dpnm/event/19313/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+RSVP+here+rarr&utm_campaign=MH_EM_EV_NobHill_180905_1_1&source=MH_EM_EV_NobHill_180905_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_EV_NobHill_180905_1_1&ms=MH_EM_EV_NobHill_180905_1_1")**

[](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b760/43d8135f/67296fdf/5100155e/4229242906/VEsE/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/dpnm/event/19313/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=MH_EM_EV_NobHill_180905_1_1&source=MH_EM_EV_NobHill_180905_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_EV_NobHill_180905_1_1&ms=MH_EM_EV_NobHill_180905_1_1")
We're looking forward to seeing you on Sunday and thank you again for supporting Martin!

Best,
Brad

Campaign Manager,

name: Cate Domino, bobcasey.com
subject: This is bad news, team, and we need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e635e/51dbcc2a/1d13dba4/3a860fd/3592456582/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
Team --

I'll be honest with you, in August we fell short of our fundraising goal. Every dollar we missed out on makes it that much harder for us to re-elect Bob and push back against Republicans like Congressman Barletta and President Trump.

We're two months out from Election Day, and Pennsylvania's Democratic Senate seat is on the line. But because we missed our goal, our campaign manager is taking a hard look at the budget, and our advertising spending is on the chopping block.

**_[I need your help to make up the ground we lost in August, or we won't be able to effectively push back against Republican attacks. Can you chip in $5 today?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180905_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

If we can't close the gap this month then the GOP and Congressman Barletta will be ready to outspend us at every corner -- we can't let that happen. This summer, _WHYY_ predicted that this will be one of the most expensive Senate races in the country, so we need money in the bank to stay in the running.

**I'm proud to work for Bob because he stands up for working families and has been a firewall against Republican attempts to gut affordable health care. We simply can't lose his voice in the Senate.**

With so much on the line we can't afford to fall short again -- can you help today?

Here's the best link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/donate](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180905_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks,

Cate

Cate Domino
Digital Director
Bob Casey for Senate

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180905_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
There's never been a more important time to get involved.
#

Peter -
The primary is next week, and we're doing everything we can to turn out as many voters for Zephyr as we can. There's never been a more important time to get involved.
We're making a big push to call voters every day, and we're counting on supporters like you to help us reach more voters. If you can step up to join us right now, we can win this together.
**[Will you sign up to call voters before the primary on September 13? Add your name right now, and our team will be in touch shortly.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780905/6e822e2f/1d6480fe/4173a180/1453960611/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA5MDUtMi1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/s/call-voters?source=em180905-2-full")**
One-on-one conversations are one of the most effective ways to persuade and turn out voters. Our system is easy to use and ensures you're only connected to Democratic voters.
It can be done from anywhere. It's simple, it works, and it's necessary for a race as competitive as ours. With so much hanging in the balance, the calls you make will truly make a difference in the outcome of this election.
**Add your name here to commit to****help****:**
**[https://go.zephyrforny.com/call-voters](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780905/6e822e2f/1d6480fe/4173a180/1453960611/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA5MDUtMi1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/s/call-voters?source=em180905-2-full")**
We have one week to go. Let's leave it all on the field!
Aly Johnson-Kurts
Field Director
Zephyr for NY

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Governor Holcomb Leads on Infrastructure
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
Governor Eric Holcomb is making major news this week, and it'll have a big impact Hoosiers on every corner of the state. Next Level Connections... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/governor-holcomb-leads-on-infrastructure?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **Governor Eric Holcomb Leads on Infrastructure**
_**Announces Major New Infrastructure Plan for Indiana!**_
---
|
---
| Governor Eric Holcomb is making major news this week, and it'll have a big impact on Hoosiers in every corner of the state.

[Next Level Connections](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7bf18c66da&e=1acd9bb3d6), Governor Holcomb's 2019 infrastructure plan, will**invest $1 billion into the infrastructure that connects us both around the corner and around the world** \-- broadband, roads, rail, water, flights and trails.

This new boost of infrastructure funding will go a long way, taking care of long-time, major priorities for Indiana -- _including completing the last section of I-69 by 2024 (three years early!), reducing the frequency of stops on U.S. 31 between Indianapolis and South Bend to just two, and making big improvements on U.S. 20 and U.S. 30 in northern Indiana. _
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=182c458eee&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| But infrastructure isn't just roads. That's why Governor Holcomb is also making a major investment in connecting us globally through more international flights and expanded access to affordable, high-speed broadband in our state's rural communities, as well as locally through hiking, biking and riding trails.

And...perhaps most exciting...**Governor Holcomb is making these big strides for Indiana without raising taxes**! Through a new agreement with the Indiana Toll Road operator, Indiana will receive $1 billion over three years in exchange for a one-time toll increase on mostly out-of-state, heavy vehicles traveling on the Indiana Toll Road (_passenger vehicles aren't impacted_).
_**Governor Holcomb has a vision to take Indiana to the NEXT LEVEL, and he is taking us there! **_
See what Hoosier leaders are saying about Governor Holcomb's [big Next Level Connections plan](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dc8745ec9f&e=1acd9bb3d6):
---
| | "Infrastructure, from roads to broadband, is vital for growth, and I am grateful that Governor Holcomb is focused on this issue."
[**-Senator Todd Young**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9f49776c73&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | “Coming from Evansville, I have a real appreciation for the importance of connecting Hoosiers to other parts of the state, and know we are all an important part of Indiana. I look forward to working with our governor, partners and community providers to continue improving our state’s quality of place.”
[**-Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c2f8ea0a77&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | “Dependable infrastructure contributes greatly to Indiana’s economy and quality of life for our citizens. Ensuring our state has sound transportation and broadband systems is key as we work to continue attracting businesses and talent to our state, and I applaud the governor’s focus on this important issue.”
[**-Senate President Pro Tem-elect Rod Bray**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=93bf8d0153&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | "Today’s announcement underscores Gov. Eric Holcomb’s commitment to making our state an attractive destination for workers and businesses alike. I look forward to working with the governor to help build connections for all Hoosiers through supporting strong policies that solidify Indiana’s position as the economic powerhouse of the Midwest.”
[**-House Speaker Brian Bosma**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=62a19844e4&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | “Gov. Eric Holcomb’s Next Level Connections program wisely highlights the need for Indiana to complete the evaluation of developing a fourth port in Lawrenceburg. When looking at areas of infrastructure investment, our waterways must be included. Southeast Indiana’s economic potential is significant, and Holcomb’s support for finalizing the analysis of this port shows that Indiana is looking at all opportunities ‘to take Indiana to the next level.’”
[**-State Rep. Randy Frye**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b3938f49c9&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | “Over the past several years, the General Assembly made crucial investments to provide a solid foundation supporting innovative programs that address the state’s current and future infrastructure needs. I look forward to continuing to work with Gov. Holcomb as he adds to state policies so we can further strengthen Indiana’s economy and keep Hoosiers connected.”
[**-State Rep. Peggy Mayfield**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bd9da4707c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | "Building on Next Level Roads – which gave Indiana the nation’s only fully-funded infrastructure plan – Next Level Connections provides us with the expanded resources Indiana needs to go from the Crossroads of America to the crossroads of the world. Whether it’s access to high-speed, affordable broadband, more international flights, quicker completion of major highway projects or more trails connecting our communities, Next Level Connections will impact every Hoosier in every corner of the state."
[**-Kyle Hupfer, Chairman of the Indiana Republican Party**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0cb7bdfc94&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | "It’s an excellent day for Indiana agriculture and rural communities across Indiana. Anytime we can expand broadband and help put our rural communities on a level playing field with our city friends, is a good day for rural Indiana."
**-Randy Kron, President, Indiana Farm Bureau**
---
| | "Over the last two years, Governor Holcomb and the Indiana General Assembly have taken significant and positive steps to advance the availability of affordable and reliable high-speed internet for all of Indiana. We applaud the governor's leadership and continued engagement with the electric cooperatives on this important issue. Today's announcement further demonstrates Governor Holcomb's commitment to eliminating the 'haves and have-nots' and to reshaping how this vital service is made available to all Hoosiers, regardless of location."
[**-Tom VanParis, CEO of Indiana Electric Cooperatives**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4d6e15ed4a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | "Governor Holcomb announcing almost $1 billion in infrastructure investments in Indiana today, including $90 million for trails to connect communities and people to natural areas. Visionary announcement!"
**-Mary McConnell, State Director of the Indiana Chapter of The Nature Conservancy**
---
| | "[Governor Holcomb's Next Level Connections plan is] investing real money to enhance access to broadband...Excited to see some quality of place projects included in Governor Holcomb's Next Level Connections agenda. Trails/biking amenities attract talent!"

---

**\- Evansville Deputy Mayor Steve Schaefer**

And at the base of it all, one of the most essential things that government can do is to connect people through infrastructure. **-Ryan Goodwin, Morgan County Commissioner**

**-Former State Rep. Mike Murphy**

clean_body: Governor Eric Holcomb is making major news this week, and it'll have a big impact Hoosiers on every corner of the state. Next Level Connections... | | | | | | | Governor Eric Holcomb Leads on Infrastructure Announces Major New Infrastructure Plan for Indiana! | | Governor Eric Holcomb is making major news this week, and it'll have a big impact on Hoosiers in every corner of the state. , Governor Holcomb's 2019 infrastructure plan, willinvest $1 billion into the infrastructure that connects us both around the corner and around the world \-- broadband, roads, rail, water, flights and trails. This new boost of infrastructure funding will go a long way, taking care of long-time, major priorities for Indiana -- including completing the last section of I-69 by 2024 (three years early!), reducing the frequency of stops on U.S. 31 between Indianapolis and South Bend to just two, and making big improvements on U.S. 20 and U.S. 30 in northern Indiana. | | But infrastructure isn't just roads. That's why Governor Holcomb is also making a major investment in connecting us globally through more international flights and expanded access to affordable, high-speed broadband in our state's rural communities, as well as locally through hiking, biking and riding trails. And...perhaps most exciting...Governor Holcomb is making these big strides for Indiana without raising taxes! Through a new agreement with the Indiana Toll Road operator, Indiana will receive $1 billion over three years in exchange for a one-time toll increase on mostly out-of-state, heavy vehicles traveling on the Indiana Toll Road (passenger vehicles aren't impacted). Governor Holcomb has a vision to take Indiana to the NEXT LEVEL, and he is taking us there! See what Hoosier leaders are saying about Governor Holcomb's : | | "Infrastructure, from roads to broadband, is vital for growth, and I am grateful that Governor Holcomb is focused on this issue." | | “Coming from Evansville, I have a real appreciation for the importance of connecting Hoosiers to other parts of the state, and know we are all an important part of Indiana. I look forward to working with our governor, partners and community providers to continue improving our state’s quality of place.” | | “Dependable infrastructure contributes greatly to Indiana’s economy and quality of life for our citizens. Ensuring our state has sound transportation and broadband systems is key as we work to continue attracting businesses and talent to our state, and I applaud the governor’s focus on this important issue.” | | "Today’s announcement underscores Gov. Eric Holcomb’s commitment to making our state an attractive destination for workers and businesses alike. I look forward to working with the governor to help build connections for all Hoosiers through supporting strong policies that solidify Indiana’s position as the economic powerhouse of the Midwest.” | | “Gov. I look forward to continuing to work with Gov. Holcomb as he adds to state policies so we can further strengthen Indiana’s economy and keep Hoosiers connected.” | | "Building on Next Level Roads – which gave Indiana the nation’s only fully-funded infrastructure plan – Next Level Connections provides us with the expanded resources Indiana needs to go from the Crossroads of America to the crossroads of the world. name: Petition via TimKaine.com
subject: Betsy DeVos isn't looking out for our students
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek,

Betsy DeVos has been using her position as Secretary of Education to undermine and undo some of the Obama administration's biggest accomplishments - **even when doing so will hurt students.**

She continued this work last week, when we learned about a new Department of Education proposal that will make college campuses less safe for students who are harassed or assaulted: | [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1133/3e0906/7291abf8/3e36c0ba/3211169346/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/DeVos?source=20180905_2_PET_TEAM_DeVos&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20180905_2_PET_TEAM_DeVos")
---
**" New U.S. Sexual Misconduct Rules Bolster Rights of Accused and Protect Colleges"**
_August 29, 2018_
**Not only is this wrong, Derek, it 's just plain mean-spirited. These policies send a message to survivors of sexual assault that they shouldn't speak out and seek justice - that their voices don't matter.**

[If you agree that we should be doing everything we can to protect and empower students, sign our petition for Betsy DeVos and the Department of Education now.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1133/3e0906/7291abf8/3e36c0b9/3211169346/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/DeVos?source=20180905_2_PET_TEAM_DeVos&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+If+you+agree+that+we+should+be+doing+eve&utm_campaign=20180905_2_PET_TEAM_DeVos")
[**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1133/3e0906/7291abf8/3e36c0b8/3211169346/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/DeVos?source=20180905_2_PET_TEAM_DeVos&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=20180905_2_PET_TEAM_DeVos")
---
Tim Kaine has spent decades fighting for survivors. He prioritized updating Virginia's laws on sexual violence and improving the treatment of survivors during his time as Governor. And he's continued this work in the Senate, passing legislation to help prevent sexual assault and harassment in our schools, colleges, and the military.

[Tim stood up to Betsy DeVos when she first rescinded Obama-era Title IX protections last fall - and he'll continue standing up to protect students. If you're standing with students and survivors, too, sign your name to our petition.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1133/3e0906/7291abf8/3e36c0bf/3211169346/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/DeVos?source=20180905_2_PET_TEAM_DeVos&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Tim+stood+up+to+Betsy+DeVos+when+she+fir&utm_campaign=20180905_2_PET_TEAM_DeVos")

Thanks,

_TK 2018 Petitions Team_

[https://secure.timkaine.com/DeVos](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1133/3e0906/7291abf8/3e36c0be/3211169346/VEsD/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/DeVos?source=20180905_2_PET_TEAM_DeVos&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+httpssecuretimkainecomDeVos&utm_campaign=20180905_2_PET_TEAM_DeVos")

body:
BRAND NEW NBC POLL: "Democrat Joe Donnelly has slight edge in Indiana Senate race" |
---

| | **BRAND NEW NBC POLL:
"Democrat Joe Donnelly has slight edge in Indiana Senate race"** | **[**Chip in to keep this lead!**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2c1f/7377f838/3b5102f6/51f81504/2929896734/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-nbc-poll?refcode=20180905.3&amount=25")**
---
Peter -- A just-released poll shows that Joe is leading Republican Rep. Mike Braun!

This is great momentum -- all of our hard work is paying off. Your donations, your volunteer hours, and your conversations at the doors are giving us a lead in this race. **_Thank you._**

**But if we 're not careful, our slight lead could disappear quicker than you can say "mega-rich Republican donors."** We know they're going to respond to this poll by dumping _even more_ cash into Indiana's Senate race. One thing is clear, the target on Joe's back just got even bigger.

On top of that, Rep. Braun has Donald Trump, Mike Pence, Mitch McConnell, and his own millions on his side. Just this morning, Politico classified our race a toss-up -- mere hours before today's poll came out.

**So if we don 't keep fighting every day, _every hour,_ until November 6th, our lead will be GONE. Don't let that happen! Rush a donation NOW to help us keep up our momentum and win this race!**
